title.ko: 인쇄, 복제, 마킹 또는 복사 방법; 컬러 인쇄 (인쇄 에러의 수정 B41J; 그림 또는 그와 유사한 것을 전사하는 방법 B44C1/16; 피복하는 것에 의하여 인쇄 에러를 수정하는 액체 매체 C09D10/00; 날염 D06P)
title.en: PRINTING, DUPLICATING, MARKING, OR COPYING PROCESSES; COLOUR PRINTING (correction of typographical errors B41J;processes for applying transfer pictures or the like B44C0001160000;fluid media for correction of typographical errors by coating C09D0010000000;printing textiles D06P)

title.ko: 인쇄기의 형식에 의한 잉크 도포 및 인쇄
title.en: Inking and printing with a printer's forme
Letterpress printing, e.g. book printing
Flexographic printing
Lithographic printing
Dry printing
Intaglio printing
Stencil printing; Silk-screen printing
Multicolour printing
using different inks which flow into one another to produce iridescent effects
Printing one ink over another
by applying differently-coloured inks simultaneously to different parts of the printing surface
Metallic printing; Printing with powdered inks

title.ko: 엠보싱(embossing)과 결합한 것(엠보싱과 결합된 인쇄 조작을 행하는 인쇄 기계 B41F 19/02)
title.en: combined with embossing (printing machines for carrying out printing operations combined with embossing B41F0019020000)

title.ko: 보통의 종이 이외의 표면에 인쇄(1/40이 우선)
title.en: Printing on other surfaces than ordinary paper (B41M0001400000 takes precedence)
on metals
on organic plastics, horn, or like materials
on rubber
on glass or ceramic surfaces
on pretreated paper, e.g. on parchment, oiled paper, paper for registration purposes

title.ko: 목재 표면, 가죽 또는 리노륨(linoleum)에 인쇄(성냥 제조와 결합된 성냥이나 성냥갑에 인쇄 C06F 1/18)
title.en: on wooden surfaces, leather, or linoleum (printing on matches or match boxes when combined with match manufacture C06F0001180000)
Printing on bodies of particular shapes
Printing without contact between forme and surface to be printed, e.g. by using electrostatic fields

title.ko: 특수한 종류의 인쇄물을 생산하는 인쇄 방법, 예 도안(특수한 디자인 또는 그림 그 자체 B44F; 인쇄 기술을 사용하는 인쇄 회로의 제조 H05K 7/12)
title.en: Printing processes to produce particular kinds of printed work, e.g. patterns (special designs or pictures per seB44F;manufacturing printed circuits using printing techniques H05K0003120000)
Maps; Sea or meteorological charts
Music
Veined printings; Fluorescent printings; Stereoscopic images; Imitated patterns, e.g. tissues, textiles
Watermarks
Transfer pictures or the like, e.g. decalcomanias
Security printing

title.ko: 점자 인쇄(braille printing) (점자 인쇄용의 타이프 라이터 또는 선택적 인자 기구 B41J 3/32)
title.en: Braille printing (typewriters or selective printing mechanisms for Braille printing B41J0003320000)
Particular kinds of wallpapers

title.ko: 복제 또는 마킹 방법 그것에 사용하는 시트 재료(감광제를 사용하는 것 G03; 전송사진, 자기사진 G03G)

with a lactone or lactam ring

using thermo-chromic compounds or layers containing liquid crystals, microcapsules, bleachable dyes or heat decomposable compounds, e.g. gas liberating
